hold_window.hold_rule: two external actions in last 6h — measurement-blur guard active

previous_turn.gap: previous run authored the code but left it unpushed; this run completed the deployment

action: BlogPosting JSON-LD enrichment + inline Codeberg CTA on blog posts

repairs.change: Added author, publisher (Organization with logo), image, dateModified, and mainEntityOfPage fields to json_ld_article
repairs.rationale: Google requires author, publisher, and image for BlogPosting rich result eligibility. Without these, no Article rich results — potentially explaining 0-click blog impression data despite search presence

repairs.change: Pass og_image to json_ld_article so blog posts with custom OG images get proper image field
repairs.rationale: Previously json_ld_article always used icon.png; now passes the article's og_image when set

repairs.change: Added inline Codeberg-first CTA banner between post header and main content
repairs.rationale: The bottom-only blog_repo_cta is below the fold for readers who don't finish the article. This inline CTA puts 'Inspect the primary repo on Codeberg' before every reader's eyes, targeting the 87% of impressions that currently hit pages with 0% CTR

defect_surface: previous run committed but did not push/deploy — this run detected the gap, completed push+deploy, verified live
post_hold_note: Post-hold must either pick an untouched truthful lane or perform concrete runtime/process repair with code/test changes. No idle hold allowed. Both prompt_repair and reentry_contract_repair already exist in this window — do not create another.
